title: Klaus Hedman awarded with the Pekka Halonen medal
content:
Klaus Hedman awarded with the Pekka Halonen medal

maperdom@helsinki.fi Thu, 09/04/2026 - 17:05
Celebrating Klaus’s Lifetime Achievements

At the opening of the Finnish Virology Days held on March 20–21, 2026, Klaus Hedman was awarded the Pekka Halonen Medal in recognition of his lifetime contributions to clinical virology.

title: 5th Summer School on Sustainable Pharmacy hosted by University of Helsinki in September 2026
content:
5th Summer School on Sustainable Pharmacy hosted by University of Helsinki in September 2026

lindymar@helsinki.fi Thu, 09/04/2026 - 10:51
Faculty of Pharmacy, University of Helsinki, hosts the 5th Summer School on Sustainable Pharmacy on 7–10 September 2026. The event offers a multifaceted view on sustainability in pharmacy for doctoral researchers, students, professionals and stakeholders from Finland and abroad. Registration is free.

title: Varhaisempi ADHD-diagnoosi on yhteydessä parempaan koulutukseen
content:
Earlier ADHD diagnosis linked to better education

pakomula@helsinki.fi Thu, 09/04/2026 - 13:58
A new study from the University of Helsinki reveals that receiving an ADHD diagnosis earlier rather than later is associated with better academic performance and lower school dropout rates.

Young people diagnosed earlier with ADHD had a higher grade point average at age 16, were more likely to pursue academic degrees, and had a lower likelihood

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

title: Helsingin yliopiston Porthania peruskorjataan
content:
University of Helsinki to renovate its Porthania building

pettergr@helsinki.fi Fri, 10/04/2026 - 09:23
Helsinki University Properties Ltd has decided to invest in an extensive renovation of Porthania.

Completed in 1957, the building is a central part of the University of Helsinki’s City Centre Campus and a significant representative of Finnish modern architecture. The renovation will ensure that the building will serve teaching, research
snippet: University of Helsinki to renovate its Porthania building pettergr@helsinki.fi Fri, 10/04/2026 - 09:23 Helsinki University Properties Ltd has decided to invest in an extensive renovation of Porthania.
